children.heading: Standards and procedures for reviews
children.label: a Standards and procedures for reviews

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall complete a review of regulations and standards (in effect on ) for the approval of an automated data processing and information retrieval system maintained by a State (hereinafter in this section referred to as a “system”) to determine the extent to which the regulations and standards contribute to a more effective and efficient program.November 28, 1990November 28, 1990

children.heading: Revision of regulations
children.label: B Revision of regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall revise regulations (in effect on ) to take into account the findings of the review conducted under subparagraph (A).November 28, 1990

children.heading: Incorporation of existing systems
children.label: C Incorporation of existing systems
children.text: The regulations shall require States to incorporate all or part of systems in use elsewhere, unless a State documents that the design and operation of an alternative system would be less costly. The Secretary shall establish standards to define the extent of modification of the systems for which payments will be made under either section 2025(a) or 2025(g) of this title.

children.heading: Implementation
children.label: D Implementation
children.text: Proposed systems shall meet standards established by the Secretary for timely implementation of proper changes.

children.heading: Cost effectiveness
children.label: E Cost effectiveness
children.text: Criteria for the approval of a system under shall include the cost effectiveness of the proposed system. On implementation of the approved system, a State shall document the actual cost and benefits of the system.section 2025(g) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: comply with conditions of initial funding approvals; and

children.label: B
children.text: adequately support program delivery in compliance with this chapter and regulations issued under this chapter.

children.heading: Standards for approval of systems
children.label: b Standards for approval of systems

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: After conducting the review required under subsection (a), the Secretary shall establish standards for approval of systems.

children.heading: Implementation
children.label: 2 Implementation
children.text: A State shall implement the standards established by the Secretary within a reasonable period of time, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Periodic compliance reviews
children.label: 3 Periodic compliance reviews
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct appropriate periodic reviews of systems to ensure compliance with the standards established by the Secretary.

children.heading: Report
children.label: c Report
children.text: Not later than , the Secretary shall report to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate on the extent to which State agencies have developed and are operating effective systems that support supplemental nutrition assistance program delivery in compliance with this chapter and regulations issued under this chapter.October 1, 1993
